creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
The build fails with the following error message:

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: '/bin/bash' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'bin/winpopup-send'
Error: '/bin/bash' is an invalid shebang you need USES=shebangfix for 'bin/winpopup-install'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net-im/kopete-kde4
